channel.title: 简报 Jae Daily · 2026年04月13日
channel.description: 国际政治 · 宏观财经 · 前沿科技 · AI 辅助分析

item.title: [未译] The Download: an exclusive Jeff VanderMeer story and AI models too scary to release

item.title: [未译] TechCrunch Mobility: Who is poaching all the self-driving vehicle talent?
item.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility, your hub for the future of transportation and now, more than ever, how AI is playing a part.

item.title: [未译] The 3 Best Mug Warmers of 2026: Better Than the Ember Mug?
item.description: The first rule of coffee is that it must stay hot. After weeks or even years of testing, these are the three coffee warmers that will best keep it that way.

item.title: [未译] Trump officials may be encouraging banks to test Anthropic’s Mythos model
item.description: The report is particularly surprising since the Department of Defense recently declared Anthropic a supply-chain risk.

item.description: A man has been arrested over alleged criminal damage of a US military plane at an Irish airport.

item.description: Given ongoing uncertainty, investors may seek to add some stability to their portfolios by buying dividend stocks for steady income.

item.title: [未译] China unveils measures to improve ties with Taiwan after visit by opposition leader
item.description: China has said it is willing to resume some ties it had suspended with Taiwan, such as direct flights to cities across China, allowing in "healthy" television dramas and facilitating food sales.

item.title: [未译] How bond market's private credit crisis fears are playing out in fixed-income ETFs
item.description: Fears of a private credit crisis arrived just as the growing and less transparent bond market was being included in more fixed-income ETFs.
